## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up on Prophecy account progress and address content creation challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy is undergoing a messaging shift, but the product remains the same](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Atlas output needs significant improvement (overly technical, incorrect links)](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Focus on simplifying content and prioritizing reader comprehension](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Aim for "good enough" articles to meet deadlines; perfectionism causing stress](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

## Topics

### Prophecy Account Update

  - [Recent meeting with Prophecy went well](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Messaging shift in progress, but doesn't significantly impact approved topics](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [New book contains updated messaging they want to use](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Enough approved topics to continue for the next couple of weeks](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Cody approved some blogs with staging](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

### Content Creation Challenges

  - [Atlas producing overly technical, complicated content](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [External links often incorrect or linking to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Writing guidelines may be too extensive and not fully utilized by Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Saskia feeling overwhelmed with technical content and Atlas limitations](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

### Strategies for Improvement

  - [Use external AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini) to simplify/verify Atlas output](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Read Prophecy's recent blog posts for tone and style reference](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Treat Atlas output as a first draft, focus on editing and simplifying](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Create tickets for recurring issues (e.g., external links, overly complex paragraphs)](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Review and optimize writing guidelines with Panza](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Workflow and Collaboration

  - [Saskia to complete article drafts and upload to Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Ehtisham to review final drafts before submission](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Team to push for distribution focus (social, email) due to declining SEO effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/-cVQkBFLAjcX18ji75ZLWW49axQmKA32?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
